import React from "react"; function About() { return (

About me

Education, internship, and technical strengths

I am pursuing Electrical Engineering with a practical interest in how products are designed, assembled, tested, and improved for real customers. My academic background has given me a foundation in core electrical concepts, system thinking, and the discipline required to work on engineering problems that involve both theory and execution.

During my internship experience, I learned how important process, communication, and documentation are in engineering teams. I got a better understanding of how product requirements translate into design decisions, how manufacturing constraints influence the final solution, and how careful iteration helps reduce errors before release. That exposure strengthened my interest in product development and manufacturing-oriented roles.

My skills include project planning, circuit understanding, basic embedded and system-level thinking, problem solving, documentation, and teamwork. I enjoy working on solutions that connect electrical engineering with practical product development, especially where reliability, cost optimization, and manufacturability matter. I am also comfortable learning quickly, adapting to new tools, and contributing to work that needs attention to detail.

Education

Electrical Engineering student with a focus on applied learning, engineering fundamentals, and industry-ready project execution.

Internship

Gained exposure to workflow discipline, engineering communication, and the way product and manufacturing decisions shape final outcomes.

Skills

Product thinking, manufacturing awareness, documentation, technical analysis, collaboration, and practical problem solving.

); } export default About;
